topics.title: Introduction to Business Economics
topics.description: Understand the purpose of business economics, how businesses create value, and the role of financial decision making.

topics.title: Costs and Cost Behaviour
topics.description: Learn about fixed, variable, mixed and step costs, and how costs behave as activity changes.

topics.title: Cost Allocation
topics.description: Learn how indirect costs are allocated to products, services and departments.

topics.title: Product Costing
topics.description: Understand how businesses calculate product costs using different costing methods.

topics.title: Contribution Margin Analysis
topics.description: Learn how contribution margin supports pricing, profitability and operational decisions.

topics.title: Cost-Volume-Profit (CVP) Analysis
topics.description: Analyze how sales volume, costs and profit interact through break-even and profit planning.

topics.title: Pricing Decisions
topics.description: Explore pricing strategies and factors that influence selling prices.

topics.title: Relevant Costs and Decision Making
topics.description: Learn how relevant costs influence business decisions while ignoring irrelevant information.

topics.title: Budgeting
topics.description: Understand budgeting, forecasting and performance planning.

topics.title: Variance Analysis
topics.description: Compare actual and budgeted performance and identify the causes of variances.

topics.title: Investment Analysis
topics.description: Evaluate investments using Payback Period, NPV, IRR, ROI and risk analysis.

topics.title: Financial Statement Analysis
topics.description: Analyze financial statements using profitability, liquidity, efficiency and solvency ratios.

topics.title: Managerial Decision Making
topics.description: Make better business decisions using relevant costs, opportunity costs, incremental analysis, outsourcing, make-or-buy decisions and capacity constraints.
